title: March 2026 risk scoring improvements
summary: Enhancements to the Insure Agent risk scoring model to improve evaluation consistency for newly launched tokens.
highlights: Refined internal scoring parameters for newly deployed tokens.
Improved consistency across early-stage token risk evaluations.
Better weighting of liquidity and ownership indicators.
General tuning of the Insure Agent risk model.

title: March 2026 token scan performance improvements
summary: Optimizations to the token scanning pipeline to reduce analysis time and improve responsiveness.
highlights: Optimized token analysis workflow.
Reduced average risk score generation time.
Improved concurrency handling for multiple scans.
General performance tuning across the scan engine.

title: February 2026 wallet risk evaluation
summary: Introduced wallet distribution analysis to detect concentrated token ownership and potential developer control risks.
highlights: Added wallet concentration analysis.
Improved detection of developer-controlled supply.
Better identification of centralized ownership patterns.
Expanded wallet-based risk indicators.

title: February 2026 data pipeline stability improvements
summary: Improved stability of the blockchain data pipeline used by the Insure Agent risk engine.
highlights: Enhanced reliability of blockchain data retrieval.
Improved failover handling during network delays.
More consistent token and liquidity data processing.
Additional monitoring across data ingestion services.

title: January 2026 initial risk engine release
summary: First functional release of the Insure Agent risk engine for evaluating token risk using on-chain indicators.
highlights: Initial deployment of the Insure Agent risk engine.
Implemented token risk evaluation using on-chain metrics.
Integrated liquidity and ownership indicators.
Established the foundation for automated token analysis.

title: January 2026 token scanning system
summary: Internal token scanning system for processing blockchain data and generating risk scores.
highlights: Built internal token scanning infrastructure.
Automated blockchain data processing.
Integrated scan output with the risk engine.
Enabled scalable token risk analysis.
